film.title: Yalgaar
film.overview: Childhood friends became enemies when one Mahendra Ashwini Kumar grows up to be Additional Police Commissioner and the other Raj Pratap Singhal becomes a smuggler.

dialogues.dialogue: Look at my knee. Mother, look at my knee. But he's ashamed to call me a brother. He's ashamed to call you a father, papa. Did you hear? But you love Vishal.
Mother, look at my knee. But he's ashamed to call me a brother. He's ashamed to call you a father, papa. Did you hear? But you love Vishal. Vishal stays away from the house.

Human should be prepared for everything. Hello, sister-in-law. - Hello, brother Rajesh. Sister-in-law, tears on this day..It's a day of pride for you. I'm proud too. But I can't control my eyes....which shed tears.

Absolutely right. I knew it. Cheers! I'm so proud of you, grandpa. Congratulations. - Thanks. Congratulations. - Congratulations. Congratulations, sir. - Thank you.
